title.ko: 손으로 추진되는 차량, 예. 핸드 카트 또는 유모차; 썰매 (동물 추진에 특징이 있는 것 B62C; 운전자 또는 엔진에 의한 썰매 추진 B62M)
title.en: HAND-PROPELLED VEHICLES, e.g. HAND CARTS OR PERAMBULATORS; SLEDGES (characterised by animal propulsion B62C;propulsion of sledges by driver or engine B62M)

definition.ko: 손수레(HAND CART) 1축을 갖는 것; 1축 이상을 갖는 것 B62B1/00; 3/00 세부 및 부속품(ACCESSORY); 얼음 또는 눈 위를 주행하기 위한 활주부(RUNNER) B62B5/00; 19/00 어린이용 수레, 유모차 B62B7/00, B62B9/00 썰매 활주부(RUNNER)를 갖는 것; 기타 형 B62B13/00; 15/00 세부 또는 부속품(ACCESSORY) B62B17/00 기타 수동추진차량 B62B11/00

title.en: Hand carts
Hand carts having only one axis carrying one or more transport wheels; Equipment therefor
in which the wheel axis is disposed between the load and the handles
involving parts being adjustable, collapsible, attachable, detachable, or convertible
involving means for grappling or securing in place objects to be carried; Loading or unloading equipment
having auxiliary wheels used during loading or unloading
in which the load is intended to be transferred totally to the wheels
involving parts being adjustable, collapsible, attachable, detachable, or convertible
involving means for grappling or securing in place objects to be carried; Loading or unloading equipment
involving tiltably-mounted containers
in which the load is disposed between the wheel axis and the handles, e.g. wheelbarrows
involving parts being collapsible, attachable, detachable or convertible
involving means for grappling or securing in place objects to be carried; Loading or unloading equipment
involving tiltably-mounted containers
characterised by supports specially adapted to objects of definite shape

title.ko: 복수개의 주행 차륜을 지지하는 2축 이상을 갖는 손수레 그것을 위한 조향 장치; 그것을 위한 장비
title.en: Hand carts having more than one axis carrying transport wheels; Steering devices therefor; Equipment therefor

title.ko: 조절 가능, 절첩 가능, 부착 가능, 탈착 가능 또는 변경 가능한 부분을 포함하는 것 (B62B 3/14 우선)
title.en: involving parts being adjustable, collapsible, attachable, detachable, or convertible (B62B0003140000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 운반되는 물건을 적당한 곳에 고정하거나 잡아매기 위한 수단을 포함하는 것; 하물 취급 장치
title.en: involving means for grappling or securing in place objects to be carried; Load handling equipment

title.ko: 지상에서 하물을 단지 분리시키기 위한 것, 예. 로-리프트 트럭(Low-lift truck) (짐을 싣거나 내리기 위한 목적으로 용적이 큰 물건 또는 중량물(重量物을) 들어올리거나 내릴수 있도록 된 차륜 주행 장치 또는 그와 유사한 것, 예. 포크-리프트 트럭(fork-lift truck), B66F 9/06)
title.en: for simply clearing the load from the ground, e.g. low-lift trucks (devices movable on wheels or the like for lifting or lowering bulky or heavy goods for loading or unloading purposes, e.g. fork-lift trucks, B66F0009060000)
with hydraulic lifting means

title.ko: 경사 가능하게 탑재된 콘테이너를 포함하는 것, (B62B 3/14이 우선)
title.en: involving tiltably-mounted containers (B62B0003140000 takes precedence)
characterised by supports specially adapted to objects of definite shape

title.ko: 3륜 구조를 특징으로 하는 것 (B62B 3/14 우선)
title.en: characterised by three-wheeled construction (B62B0003140000 takes precedence)
characterised by provisions for nesting or stacking, e.g. shopping trolleys
vertically stackable
nestable by means of pivoted load supports or load support parts, e.g. baskets

title.ko: 특히 손수레에 사용되는 부속품 또는 세부(B62B 9/00 이 우선; 차량용 차륜, 차축 또는 차축베어링 B60B; 차량용 캐스터(caster), 캐스터 일반 B60B 33/00 )
title.en: Accessories or details specially adapted for hand carts (B62B0009000000 takes precedence;wheels, axles, or axle bearings for vehicles B60B;castors for vehicles, castors in general B60B0033000000)

title.ko: 계단을 오르내리는 것(환자 또는 신체장애자에 특히 적합한 의자 또는 개인 수송 수단 A61G5/00 )
title.en: providing for travelling up or down a flight of stairs (chairs or personal conveyances specially adapted for patients or disabled persons A61G0005000000)
Braking mechanisms; Locking devices against movement

title.ko: 수동 장치, 예. 핸들 봉(자전차용 B62K 11/14, 21/12)
title.en: Hand moving equipment, e.g. handle bars (for cycles B62K0011140000, B62K0021120000)

title.ko: 어린이용 의자(B62B 3/14이 우선)
title.en: Children's seats (B62B0003140000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 어린이용 운반차; 유모차, 예. 인형 유모차
title.en: Carriages for children; Perambulators

title.ko: 어린이용 운반차; 유모차, 예. 인형 유모차
title.en: Carriages for children; Perambulators, e.g. dolls' perambulators
having only a single wheel axis

title.ko: 2축 이상을 갖는 것; 이를 위한 조향 장치
title.en: having more than one wheel axis; Steering devices therefor
collapsible or foldable
in the direction of, or at right angles to, the wheel axes
by folding down the body to the wheel carriage or by retracting projecting parts into the box-shaped body

title.ko: 변경되는 것, 예. 어린이용 가구 또는 완구로 변경할 수 있는 것 (유모차로 변경할 수 있는 어린이용 의자 A47D 1/06)
title.en: convertible, e.g. into children's furniture or toy (children's chairs convertible to push chairs A47D0001060000)
with detachable or rotatably-mounted body

title.ko: 특히 어린이용 수레 또는 유모차에 적합한 부속품 또는 세부(눈 위를 주행하기 위한 것 B62B 19/00 )
title.en: Accessories or details specially adapted for children's carriages or perambulators (providing for travelling on snow B62B0019000000)
providing for travelling up or down a flight of stairs
with runners, e.g. sledge runners
with spiders or the like
Braking mechanisms; Locking devices against movement

title.ko: 유모차 차체; 그를 위한 장치(접을 수 있는 것 B62B 7/06; 변경되는 것 B62B 7/12)
title.en: Perambulator bodies; Equipment therefor (collapsible or foldable B62B0007060000;convertible B62B0007120000)
involving parts that are adjustable, attachable or detachable
Hoods; Weather screens; Cat nets
Mud-guards or protecting devices for wheels
Resilient suspensions of bodies
Handle bars; Handles
Devices for rocking or oscillating

title.ko: 어린이용 안전 보호 장치, 예. 허니스(harness) (캣 네트 B62B 9/14; 어린이를 보호 또는 지지하는 장치 예. 안전 멜빵 A47D 13/08)
title.en: Safety guards for children, e.g. harness (cat nets B62B0009140000;devices for use in guiding or supporting children, e.g. safety harness, A47D0013080000)
Securing devices for bags or toys
Auxiliary dismountable seats

title.ko: 달리 분류되지 않는 수동 추진 차량(차량 탑승자의 추진 B62M 1/00, B62M 6/00)
title.en: Hand-propelled vehicles not otherwise provided for (rider propulsion of vehicles B62M0001000000, B62M0006000000)

title.ko: 활주부를 갖는 썰매 (빙상선 또는 범주썰매(sailing sledge) 15/00)
title.en: Sledges

title.ko: 활주부를 갖는 썰매 (빙상선 또는 범주썰매(sailing sledge) 15/00)
title.en: Sledges with runners (ice boats or sailing sledges B62B0015000000)
characterised by arrangement of runners
arranged in a single line
arranged in two or more parallel lines
with steering devices
with swivelling portions of the runners; with a swivelling middle runner
with tilting or bending runners
combined with braking devices
Collapsible or foldable sledges
Vehicles having alternatively-usable runners and wheels
Other sledges; Ice boats or sailing sledges

title.ko: 썰매의 부속품 또는 세부
title.en: Accessories or details of sledges

title.ko: 활주부(차량의 차륜에 부착할 수 있거나 교체 가능한 것 B62B 19/00 )
title.en: Runners (attachable to, or replacing, vehicle wheels B62B0019000000)
resiliently suspended
Superstructures; Attachments therefor
Braking devices
Runners for carrying wheeled vehicles to facilitate travel on ice or snow
attachable to wheels
replacing wheels
